root_text.an4.6:1.7: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo appassuto hoti sutena anupapanno?
root_text.an4.6:1.8: Idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appakaṁ sutaṁ hoti—
root_text.an4.6:1.9: suttaṁ geyyaṁ veyyākaraṇaṁ gāthā udānaṁ itivuttakaṁ jātakaṁ abbhutadhammaṁ vedallaṁ.
root_text.an4.6:1.10: So tassa appakassa sutassa na atthamaññāya dhammamaññāya dhammānudhammappaṭipanno hoti.
root_text.an4.6:1.11: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo appassuto hoti sutena anupapanno.
root_text.an4.6:2.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo appassuto hoti sutena upapanno?
root_text.an4.6:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appakaṁ sutaṁ hoti—
root_text.an4.6:2.3: suttaṁ geyyaṁ veyyākaraṇaṁ gāthā udānaṁ itivuttakaṁ jātakaṁ abbhutadhammaṁ vedallaṁ.
root_text.an4.6:2.4: So tassa appakassa sutassa atthamaññāya dhammamaññāya dhammānudhammappaṭipanno hoti.
root_text.an4.6:2.5: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo appassuto hoti sutena upapanno.
root_text.an4.6:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo bahussuto hoti sutena anupapanno?
root_text.an4.6:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa bahukaṁ sutaṁ hoti—
root_text.an4.6:3.3: suttaṁ geyyaṁ veyyākaraṇaṁ gāthā udānaṁ itivuttakaṁ jātakaṁ abbhutadhammaṁ vedallaṁ.
root_text.an4.6:3.4: So tassa bahukassa sutassa na atthamaññāya dhammamaññāya dhammānudhammappaṭipanno hoti.
root_text.an4.6:3.5: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo bahussuto hoti sutena anupapanno.
root_text.an4.6:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo bahussuto hoti sutena upapanno?
root_text.an4.6:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa bahukaṁ sutaṁ hoti—
root_text.an4.6:4.3: suttaṁ geyyaṁ veyyākaraṇaṁ gāthā udānaṁ itivuttakaṁ jātakaṁ abbhutadhammaṁ vedallaṁ.
root_text.an4.6:4.4: So tassa bahukassa sutassa atthamaññāya dhammamaññāya dhammānudhammappaṭipanno hoti.
root_text.an4.6:4.5: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo bahussuto hoti sutena upapanno.
root_text.an4.6:4.6: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasminti.

translation_text.an4.6:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.6:1.3: Little learning and not get the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:1.4: Little learning but get the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:1.5: Much learning but not get the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:1.6: Much learning and get the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:1.7: And how has an individual learned little and not got the point of learning?
translation_text.an4.6:1.8: It’s when an individual has learned little of the
translation_text.an4.6:1.9: statements, mixed prose & verse, discussions, verses, inspired exclamations, legends, stories of past lives, amazing stories, and elaborations.
translation_text.an4.6:1.10: And with the little they’ve learned, they understand neither the meaning nor the teaching, nor do they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an4.6:1.11: That’s how an individual has learned little and not got the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:2.1: And how has an individual learned little but has got the point of learning?
translation_text.an4.6:2.2: It’s when an individual has learned little of the
translation_text.an4.6:2.3: statements, mixed prose & verse, discussions, verses, inspired exclamations, legends, stories of past lives, amazing stories, and elaborations.
translation_text.an4.6:2.4: But with the little they’ve learned, they understand the meaning and the teaching, and they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an4.6:2.5: That’s how an individual has learned little but has got the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:3.1: And how has an individual learned much but hasn't got the point of learning?
translation_text.an4.6:3.2: It’s when an individual has learned much of the
translation_text.an4.6:3.3: statements, mixed prose & verse, discussions, verses, inspired exclamations, legends, stories of past lives, amazing stories, and elaborations.
translation_text.an4.6:3.4: But even though they’ve learned much, they understand neither the meaning nor the teaching, nor do they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an4.6:3.5: That’s how an individual has learned much but hasn't got the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:4.1: And how has an individual learned much and has got the point of learning?
translation_text.an4.6:4.2: It’s when an individual has learned much of the
translation_text.an4.6:4.3: statements, mixed prose & verse, discussions, verses, inspired exclamations, legends, stories of past lives, amazing stories, and elaborations.
translation_text.an4.6:4.4: And with the large amount they’ve learned, they understand the meaning and the teaching, and they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an4.6:4.5: That’s how an individual has learned much and has got the point of learning.
translation_text.an4.6:4.6: These are the four individuals found in the world.
translation_text.an4.6:5.3: they’ll criticize you on both counts,
translation_text.an4.6:5.4: for your ethics and your learning.
translation_text.an4.6:6.2: and you are steady in ethics,
translation_text.an4.6:8.2: and you are steady in ethics,
translation_text.an4.6:8.3: they’ll praise you on both counts,
translation_text.an4.6:8.4: for your ethics and your learning.
translation_text.an4.6:9.1: A wise disciple of the Buddha
translation_text.an4.6:9.2: who is learned and has memorized the teachings;
translation_text.an4.6:9.3: like a pendant of Black Plum River gold,
translation_text.an4.6:9.4: who is worthy to criticize them?
translation_text.an4.6:9.6: and by the Divinity, too, they’re praised.”

variant_text.an4.6:1.10: dhammamaññāya → na dhammamaññāya (bj, pts1ed, mr) | dhammānudhammappaṭipanno → na dhammānudhammapaṭipanno (bj)
